app.name: CMMS Web
app.tagline: Urufatiro rwa web rwiteguye gukoreshwa mu mikorere y'itorero.
app.description: Church Management and Coordination System ikoreshwa kuri browser.

shell.unitsSummary: Amatsinda mu ministéri — aborohezi, abahanzi, n'amakipe.
shell.profileSummary: Hindura amazina yawe n'inomero ya telefoni.
shell.leaderSummary: Imikorere, trends za attendance, analytics za ministry n'ibimenyetso by'ubwitange.
shell.adminSummary: Ubuzima bwa systeme, audit activity n'ibibazo bya sync.
shell.eventsSummary: Gutegura kalendari, recurrence, assignments no kugenzura conflict.
shell.attendanceSummary: Gushyira attendance, excuses, escalations n'amanota y'ubwitange.
shell.operationalSummary: Operational home ishingirwaho permissions za protocol na choir.
shell.governanceSummary: Shyira abanyamuryango mu nshingano za committee n'uburenganzira.
shell.financeSummary: Imisanzu, ingengo y'imari n'analytics zishingirwaho ministry.

myContributions.title: Imisanzu yanjye
myContributions.subtitle: Reba uko witabira n'ibyo ugomba. Aha ni ukwiyumvisha no gukurura — si guhanira.
myContributions.emptyMessage: Ministry iyo wanditse imisanzu cyangwa amafaranga, bizagaragara hano mu mucyo.
myContributions.upToDateMessage: Urakoze ku kwifatanya mu stewardship y'umuryango.
myContributions.consistencyHint: Uburyo ibyo wanditse byishyurwa buri gihe.
myContributions.ministryHint: Ministries aho ufite ibikorwa byanditswe gusa.
myContributions.remindersHint: Ibyo utarishyura cyangwa byishyuwe igice — vugana na treasurer niba ukeneye ubufasha.

financeStewardship.title: Finance stewardship
financeStewardship.subtitle: Imisanzu n'ingengo y'imari ku ministry. Uko ubona biterwa n'permissions za committee.
financeStewardship.unauthorized: Nta access ya finance stewardship ufite.
financeStewardship.recentTransactionsHint: Transactions zemewe za ministry mu scope yawe.
financeStewardship.noTransactionsHint: Transactions za ministry zizagaragara iyo zanditswe.
financeStewardship.pendingApprovalsHint: Suzuma expenses mbere yo gukora ku balance ya ministry.
financeStewardship.contributionQueueHint: Suzuma imisanzu yoherejwe mbere yo kuyandika mu bitabo bya ministry.
financeStewardship.acknowledgmentHint: Uko imurakoze yoherejwe ku misanzu yemejwe mu scope yawe.
financeStewardship.noBudgetsHint: Ingengo y'imari izagaragara iyo abayobozi bazishyiraho.

welfare.title: Ubusabane
welfare.description: Kwita ku banyamuryango — ubusabane, imisanzu n'ubufasha.
welfare.assistanceSubtitle: Andika amafaranga, ibikoresho, ubwikorezi cyangwa ubundi bufasha.

rehearsals.title: Igihe cyo kwitoza
rehearsals.attendanceSubtitle: Uhari, ugeze vuba, wababajwe cyangwa utabaye.

metrics.contributionsHidden: Ibipimo by'imari biraboneka ku bafite uburenganzira.

governanceAdmin.title: Committee governance
governanceAdmin.subtitle: Shyiraho protocol na choir committee roles. Permissions zikora ku login ikurikira.
governanceAdmin.assignDescription: Hitamo umunyamuryango na role. Assignments ziriho z'iyo role zavugururwa.
governanceAdmin.rolesDescription: Roles zigenewe iyi ministry (seed cyangwa admin config).
governanceAdmin.assignmentsDescription: Abanyamuryango ba committee n'imikorere yabo ya governance.
governanceAdmin.noAssignments: Shyiraho abanyamuryango ku committee roles kugira ngo governance ikore.
governanceAdmin.emptyRolesDescription: Shyiraho roles kuri iyi ministry mbere yo guha abanyamuryango.

operational.title: Operational center
operational.subtitle: Incamake y'ubuyobozi bwa {role}. Fungura attendance cyangwa coverage kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro.
operational.detailHint: Fungura attendance cyangwa coverage kugira ngo ukore imikorere y'ingenzi.
operational.choirSummaryHint: Ibikoresho bya Korali biri mu attendance workspace.
operational.choirUseAttendance: Koresha attendance workspace kugira ngo umark attendance ya Korali.

events.title: Moteri y'ibyabaye
events.subtitle: Tegura ibyabaye, recurrence n'inzira zo kugena inshingano.
events.noPoolCandidates: Nta bantu bahari muri rotation pool.
events.conflictDetected: Habonetse conflict na "{title}" ku gihe gihurirana.

assignments.title: Assignments - {event}
assignments.memberPlaceholder: Andika member id cyangwa uhitemo muri pool
assignments.poolSubtitle: Koresha rotation pool kugira ngo wuzuze quotas vuba.
assignments.noPool: Nta rotation pool iboneka kuri iyi event.
assignments.noPoolDescription: Teganya choir rotation cyangwa shyiraho abanyamuryango ukoresheje ID.

attendance.title: Gukurikirana attendance
attendance.subtitle: Shyira attendance y'imikorere, genzura excuses, escalations n'ubwitange.

markingFlow.sectionHint: Hitamo inzira — uyu munsi, excuses, cyangwa amateka y'umunyamuryango.
markingFlow.noExcusedDescription: Absences zexcused zitegereje review zizagaragara hano.
markingFlow.noHistoryDescription: Fungura tab ya Uyu munsi, hitamo event, hanyuma ukande izina ry'umunyamuryango.

eventPicker.title: Ibyabaye biri imbere
eventPicker.subtitle: Hitamo service cyangwa rehearsal wo gushyiraho attendance.
eventPicker.empty: Nta byabaye mu minsi 30 iri imbere.

roster.title: Urutonde rw'abafitwe inshingano
roster.subtitleIdle: Hitamo igikorwa kugira ngo urutonde rupakire.
roster.selectEvent: Hitamo igikorwa kugira ngo utangire attendance.
roster.empty: Nta munyamuryango ufite inshingano kuri iki gikorwa.

excuseReview.title: Gusuzuma excuses
excuseReview.subtitle: Emeza cyangwa wange excuses cyangwa escalade.

teamHead.title: Ikibaho cya Team Head
teamHead.empty: Nta risk ya attendance ku matsinda yawe.
teamHead.emptyDescription: Absences na escalations bizagaragara hano iyo bikeneye kwitabwaho.
teamHead.noTeamsDescription: Amatsinda ya protocol azagaragara nyuma yo gukorwa.

coordinator.title: Ikibaho cya Coordinator
coordinator.empty: Nta risk ya attendance muri iki gihe.
coordinator.emptyDescription: Escalations na absences zitegereje bizagaragara hano.

president.title: Ikibaho cya President
president.empty: Nta case y'escalade ku rwego rwa ministry.
president.emptyDescription: Escalations n'absences zidasubijwe ku rwego rwa ministry bizagaragara hano.
president.noTrendDescription: Trend izuzura nyuma y'amezi menshi yo kwandika attendance.

discipline.title: Discipline recommendations
discipline.subtitle: Review ya pastoral isabwa.
discipline.emptyDescription: Nta munyamuryango wagaragajwe na reliability scoring.

markDialog.evidenceHint: Link y'ubushake ku document cyangwa ubutumwa bwo kureba na pastoral team.
markDialog.replacementConfirm: Emeza ko uyu munyamuryango yakoze replacement kuri iyi event.
markDialog.voluntaryConfirm: Emeza voluntary extra service — ntibibarwa nk'official assignment.

escalationDialog.title: Escalade absence — {member}
escalationDialog.description: Ohereza iyi case ku rwego rwo hejuru iyo review y'ahantu bidahagije.
escalationDialog.notesHint: Ibisobanuro by'ubushake ku muyobozi wakira iyi case.

excuseActionDialog.approveHint: Ibi byemeza ko absence y'excuse yemewe mu makuru y'imikorere.

teamHead.title: Ikibaho cya Team Head
teamHead.emptyDescription: Swaps na replacements bitegereje review bizagaragara hano.

coordinator.title: Ikibaho cya Coordinator
coordinator.emptyDescription: Escalations na staffing risks bizagaragara hano.

dialogs.escalateDescription: Ohereza iyi coverage case ku rwego rwo hejuru.

foundation.title: Urufatiro rwa web rwiteguye ku masprint y'umusaruro.
foundation.description: Aha hashyizweho Next.js, indimi nyinshi, igenzura rya env, themes, guhuza API, providers zisangiwe n'inzira zikingiwe.

landing.defaultWelcome: Twiyunge mu muryango wacu wo gusenga, guhuriza no gukorera.

choirPresident.title: Ikigo cy'ibikorwa — perezida w'ikorali
choirPresident.subtitle: Ubusabe bwo kwinjira n'ibikorwa by'ikorali bizaza.

protocolCoordinator.title: Ikigo cy'ibikorwa — umuvugizi wa protocol
protocolCoordinator.subtitle: Ubusabe bwo kuba umunyamuryango, guhindura n'amatsinda azaza.
protocolCoordinator.error: Ntibyashobotse gupakira ikigo cy'ibikorwa cya protocol.

choirDiscovery.title: Amakorali
choirDiscovery.subtitle: Menya amakorali yacu usabe kwinjira. Ikorali imwe nyamukuru irakenewe; Yerusalemu ishobora kubana n'iyindi.
choirDiscovery.emptyDescription: Subira nyuma cyangwa vugana n'umuyobozi w'ikorali.

protocolDiscovery.title: Umurimo wa protocol
protocolDiscovery.subtitle: Abanyamuryango ba protocol bakira abashyitsi, bakayobora serivisi kandi bakorera ubucuti. Abashya binjira binyuze mu butumire.
protocolDiscovery.claimNotesLabel: Tubwire ku murimo wawe wa protocol (si ngombwa)

protocolOps.title: Ibikorwa bya protocol
protocolOps.description: Amatsinda y'igihe gito, kwitabira, guhindura n'imikorere.
protocolOps.attendanceHint: Hitamo itsinda ryasohotse mu Matsinda, hanyuma wandike ibyabaye binyuze kuri API cyangwa porogaramu ya telefoni.

auth.title: Murakaza neza
auth.subtitle: Injira kugira ngo urebe serivisi, ibirori, amatangazo, imirimo, amakorali n'ibikorwa bya protocol.
auth.hint: Abanyamuryango bashya bashobora kwiyandikisha bakaba bitegereje kwemezwa n'umuyobozi.
auth.forgotPasswordPlaceholder: Guhindura ijambo banga binyuze kuri imeri bizaza mu gihe gito. Vugana n'umuyobozi w'umurimo niba ukeneye ubufasha.

profile.title: Umwirondoro
profile.subtitle: Hindura amazina yawe n'inomero ya telefoni.
profile.phoneBannerMessage: Ongeraho nimero ya telefoni kugira ngo urangize umwirondoro wawe.
profile.phoneRequired: Nimero ya telefoni irakenewe kugira ngo ukomeze.
profile.restrictedUntilPhoneAdded: Nimero ya telefoni irakenewe kugira ngo ukomeze imirimo y'umurimo.
profile.warningPhoneIncomplete: Uzuze nimero ya telefoni kugira ngo utazabura uburyo bwo gukoresha ibikoresho by'umurimo.

signup.pageSubtitle: Bose batangira nk'abanyamuryango b'itorero. Korali, protocol n'imirimo birashobora kongerwaho nyuma.
signup.cardSubtitle: Uburyo bworoshye bwo kwiyandikisha mu muryango wacu.
signup.interestsHint: Ibi ni ibyo ukunda gusa — nta bunyamuryango buhabwa mu kwiyandikisha.
signup.approvalExplanation: Nyuma yo kohereza, umuyobozi azasuzuma kwiyandikisha kwawe. Ushobora kwinjira urebe aho ugeza.

pending.title: Icyifuzo cyawe gisuzumwa
pending.body: Kwiyandikisha kwawe mu murimo kwakiriwe. Abayobozi barimo gusuzuma kugira ngo uhabwe uburenganzira bukwiye.
pending.stepAccess: Niyo wemewe, uzashobora kubona gahunda, attendance n'amakuru y'umurimo.
pending.helpHint: Niba ukeneye ubufasha, vugana n'umuyobozi wa korali cyangwa wa protocol.

welcome.title: Murakaza neza
welcome.welcomeChoirMember: Murakaza neza kuri platform ya korali. Abayobozi bazaguha inshingano n'imyiteguro iri imbere.
welcome.welcomeProtocolMember: Murakaza neza kuri platform ya protocol. Abayobozi bazasangiza gahunda n'amakuru y'umurimo.
welcome.welcomeBothMember: Murakaza neza. Ukora mu korali na protocol — abayobozi bazagukurikirana.
welcome.welcomeChoirLeader: Murakaza neza. Reba ibikorwa bya korali, attendance n'amakuru ava hano.
welcome.welcomeProtocolLeader: Murakaza neza. Reba ibikorwa bya protocol, coverage n'amakuru ava hano.
welcome.welcomeCommittee: Murakaza neza. Ibikoresho bya komite n'ibipimo by'umurimo biri hano.
welcome.welcomeSuperAdmin: Murakaza neza. Ibikoresho byo gucunga sisitemu birahari.
welcome.welcomeChurchMember: Murakaza neza! Uri mu muryango wacu. Korali na protocol ni ubusabe — menya igihe witeguye.
welcome.message: Reba serivisi, ibirori, ibyerekanwa, amakorali, imirimo n'amatangazo.
welcome.nextSteps: Menya porogaramu y'umunyamuryango ku rugendo rwawe. Abayobozi baracyari mu nshingano.

memberProfile.subtitle: Imiterere: {status}
memberProfile.noLeadershipHint: Inshingano z'umuryango cyangwa komite zizagaragara hano.
memberProfile.welfareOpenCases: {count, plural, =0 {Nta dosiye ifunguye} one {Dosiye # ifunguye} other {Dosiye # zifunguye}}

dashboard.title: Urufatiro rwa dashboard ikingiwe
dashboard.subtitle: Uru rupapuro rurarinzwe kandi rwiteguye kwakira widgets za Sprint 3.
dashboard.memberExcuseDescription: Ohereza excuse ku murimo uri imbere. Umuyobozi azayigenzura.
dashboard.dashboardLoadError: Ntibyashobotse kubona amakuru ya dashboard ubu.
dashboard.adminSubtitle: Uru rupapuro rugaragaza ko role guards zikora mbere yo kubaka dashboards nini.
dashboard.leaderUpcomingEventsHint: Ibikorwa biteganyijwe mu minsi 7 iri imbere.
dashboard.leaderAttendanceHint: Ubwitange bwa operational buremereye bw'ukwezi turimo.
dashboard.attendanceTrendDescription: Imihindagurikire ya attendance mu mezi atandatu ashize.
dashboard.ministryAnalyticsDescription: Uko abanyamuryango bakora bagabanijwe mu ma ministry.
dashboard.financeCardDescription: Reba vuba finance n'ibikenewe kuri sync.
dashboard.statsFromTransactions: Hafashwe transactions za finance zingana na {count}.
dashboard.memberAttendanceHint: Uko attendance yawe yitwaye vuba aha.
dashboard.memberResponsibilityHint: Attendance hamwe n'amanota y'ubwitange ku mpamvu zisobanuye.
dashboard.notificationsDescription: Amatangazo ya vuba yoherejwe kuri konti yawe.
dashboard.attendanceCardDescription: Records ziheruka za attendance ku mwirondoro wawe.
dashboard.noAttendanceHistory: Nta mateka ya attendance ahari ubu.
dashboard.systemSyncHint: Conflicts za sync zigikeneye attention ya admin.
dashboard.systemHealthDescription: Imiterere ya platform ishingiye kuri conflicts na audit freshness.
dashboard.auditTrendDescription: Ingano y'ibikorwa mu mezi atandatu ashize.
dashboard.syncDiagnosticsDescription: Conflicts za vuba zishobora kubuza systeme gukomeza neza.

governance.teamReliabilityDescription: Igipimo cyo guhuza na korali mu makipe ya protocol akora.
governance.replacementMixDescription: Isesengura ry'isimburana rya official na voluntary ku kwezi.
governance.roleWidgetsDescription: Sections za dashboard zifungurwa n'uburenganzira bwa governance.
governance.memberHistoryDescription: Uko umaze iminsi ukorera mu makipe ya protocol.
governance.noProtocolHistory: Nta mateka ya protocol team arahari.
governance.noCommitteeHistory: Nta mateka ya committee role arahari.
governance.memberAccessDescription: Ibyo ushobora gukora mu scope yawe ubu.
governance.choirCompatibilityDescription: Ijanisha ry'assignments za protocol zihuje n'icyifuzo cyo guhuza na korali.
governance.adminAccessDescription: Controls za governance zifunguye kuri iyi konti.

hub.title: Imisanzu y'umuryango
hub.subtitle: Ahakorerwa imisanzu y'ikorali mu muryango wawe.
hub.noAccessMessage: Nturi umuyobozi, umudepite cyangwa umunyamabanga w'umuryango.
hub.viewOnlyBadge: Reba gusa — ntushobora kwemeza cyangwa kwanga.

pending.title: Kwemera gutegereje
pending.subtitle: Suzuma kandi wemeze imisanzu yatanzwe.
pending.noAccessMessage: Nta burenganzira bwo kuyobora umuryango ufite.

detail.title: Isuzuma ry'imisanzu
detail.subtitle: Isuzuma n'amateka y'ibikorwa.
detail.notFound: Imisanzu ntiboneka cyangwa si mu muryango wawe.
detail.viewOnlyActions: Ushobora kureba gusa — ntushobora kwemeza cyangwa kwanga.

goals.title: Intego z'umuryango
goals.subtitle: Iterambere ry'ikampani mu muryango wawe.
goals.emptyMessage: Intego ziboneka iyo hari amakampani akora cyangwa arangiye.

contributions.title: Imiturire yanjye
contributions.subtitle: Amateka yawe n'iterambere ry'imiturire ya koro.
contributions.emptyMessage: Iyo wohereje umusanzu, uzaboneka hano n'imiterere yawo.

detail.title: Ibisobanuro by'umusanzu
detail.subtitle: Nomero, umuryango, n'ibyemezo.
detail.notFound: Umusanzu ntabwo uboneka cyangwa nta burenganzira.

form.title: Ohereza umusanzu
form.subtitle: Menyesha umuryango wawe kugira ngo wemeze.

common.roleGuard: Wamaze kwinjira, ariko role yawe ntiyemera iyi nzira.
